title: poa lanigera
intro: Poa lanigera, also known as woolly meadow-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the genus Poa, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Poa lanigera include its ability to improve digestion, boost the immune system, and act as a natural diuretic. Poa lanigera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
